case_title: MONICA RAJA BELTRAN VS. MATTHEW S. BREEN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-18-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-05-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MONICA BELTRAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MATTHEW BREEN IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: CONTINUANCE ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF, RETURNED,VACANT

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-28-2022 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF MONICA RAJA BELTRAN, HOWEVER REQUESTED COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER SHANNON RAINTREE IS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT MATTHEW S. BREEN. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE (FILING REJECTED). JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAJA BELTRAN, MONICA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BREEN, MATTHEW S. $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,700.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT BREEN, MATTHEW S. HEARING SET FOR MAR-28-2022 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINIATION TAKEN OFF CALENDAR: NO APPEARANCES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY RAJA BELTRAN, MONICA AS TO DEFENDANT BREEN, MATTHEW S. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-18-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-05-2021 - CONTINUED ON THE COURTS OWN MOTION TO DEC-20-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MONICA RAJA BELTRAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MATTHEW S. BREEN IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A DATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-20-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-20-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF MONICA RAJA BELTRAN IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED SPANISH COURT INTERPRETER PIEDAD BLANCO-KRETCHMER. DEFENDANT MATTHEW S. BREEN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO MATTHEW S. BREEN-ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $250.00) SERVED OCT-11-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BREEN, MATTHEW S.
DECLARATION CHANGE OF ADDRESS FOR DEFENDANT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAJA BELTRAN, MONICA
ORDER CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. (SEE SCAN DOCUMENT).
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BREEN, MATTHEW S.
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-05-2021 AT 1:30 P.M. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-20-2021 - JUDGMENT.
